suppress.notes: file name: json-20201115.jar CVE-2022-45688 in org.json/json - misleading CPE The cpe on the NIST site: cpe:2.3:a:hutool:hutool:5.8.10:*:*:*:*:*:*:* does not seem related to org.json/json https://github.com/jeremylong/DependencyCheck/issues/5401 users can already have some control by setting the -Xss JVM option

file name: spring-boot-loader-2.7.18.jar We are pinned to Spring Boot 2.7.x on Java 17. There is no newer 2.7.x release in Maven Central, so these CVEs cannot be remediated by an in-line version bump at the moment.
Jetty 10.0.26 is the newest Jetty 10 release available in Maven Central. Remediation for this CVE requires moving off the Jetty 10 line, which is outside the current Java 17 / Jetty 10 constraints.
